title: SPmodpack/SPMmodpack
description: This modpack is intended for players of the private SP/SPM server. This modpack has all the necessary mods and not only that you may need to play on the SP/SPM. This modpack contains only the basic tools for playing the SP/SPM.
body:
**SPmodpac/SPMmodpack**

This mod pack is designed for players of the SP/SPM server for a convenient and comprehensive game. 

This mod pack contains only the necessary mods for a comfortable game on SP/SPM
